metadata.persona_summary: VP Finance at lost mid-market deal

transcript.speaker: methodic
transcript.text: What changed between initial interest and not moving forward?

transcript.speaker: methodic
transcript.text: When you say price, do you mean budget timing, ROI proof, procurement, or competitor offer?

tool_call.output_summary: trial_usage.report_builder_reached=false; logins=3; CRM notes confirm finance asked for ROI proof and quarter closed before commit.

transcript.speaker: methodic
transcript.text: The trial shows your team logged in three times but never reached the report-builder workflow. Was the ROI concern because the value was unclear, or because the report output didn't map to your business case?

transcript.speaker: participant
transcript.text: Finance never saw proof. We never got to the report output.

transcript.speaker: methodic
transcript.text: Was budget timing a factor independent of the ROI proof?

transcript.speaker: participant
transcript.text: The quarter had closed by the time we were ready to commit.

transcript.speaker: methodic
transcript.text: Anything related to procurement, security review, or a competitor we should know about?

transcript.speaker: participant
transcript.text: No procurement involvement — the deal closed before we got there. No security or competitor issues.

expected_response.persona_summary: VP Finance at lost mid-market deal

evidence.quote: Finance never saw proof. We never got to the report output.

The quarter had closed by the time we were ready to commit.
